# How to Review Your Bankruptcy Case [2026 Guide]
> Last updated: 2026-05-01

> How to review your bankruptcy case for errors, missed deadlines, and fee overcharges. Protect yourself with this step-by-step 2026 guide.

## About
bankruptcylawyerreview.org is part of the Open Bankruptcy Project (openbankruptcyproject.org), a 501(c)(3) nonprofit building free, open-source tools for bankruptcy court transparency.

## Key Pages
- How to Review Your Bankruptcy Attorney's Billing: https://bankruptcylawyerreview.org/billing-review.html
- Understanding Your Bankruptcy Case File: https://bankruptcylawyerreview.org/case-file.html
- Common Issues in Bankruptcy Representation: https://bankruptcylawyerreview.org/common-issues.html
- How to Read Your Bankruptcy Docket: https://bankruptcylawyerreview.org/docket-reading.html
- How to Review Your Bankruptcy Case: https://bankruptcylawyerreview.org/
- Your Rights as a Bankruptcy Client: https://bankruptcylawyerreview.org/your-rights.html
- Privacy Policy: https://bankruptcylawyerreview.org/privacy.html

## Contact
- Website: https://openbankruptcyproject.org
- Email: contact@openbankruptcyproject.org
- GitHub: https://github.com/openbankruptcyproject

## License
Content is provided for educational purposes. Data sourced from the Federal Judicial Center Integrated Database (4.9M cases, 94 districts).
